artists.name: Carlos Vives
artists.bio_excerpt: With 17 Latin GRAMMY® Awards, two GRAMMY® Awards, and a place in the Billboard Latin Music Awards Hall of Fame, Carlos Vives has forever changed Latin music. artists.name: Chayanne
artists.bio_excerpt: Chayanne was born in Puerto Rico but raised in the world stage. Performing before crowds of adoring fans, acting on film and television at a very young age as part of the group Los Chicos, transitioning to a solo artist came naturally to Chayanne. artists.name: DARUMAS
artists.bio_excerpt: Introducing DARUMAS, an extraordinary live musical trio composed of multi-talented musicians and songwriters spanning the diverse landscape of Latin rhythms and culture – Aldana, Ceci, and Vedala. artists.notes: Trio: Aldana (AR), Ceci (CU-US), Vedala (HT-CL). Debut album 2024.

artists.bio_excerpt: Emilia is a young Argentine singer-songwriter, musician, dancer, and actress whose tireless pursuit of excellence in the arts has led her to become an exceptional figure in the entertainment industry. artists.name: Prince Royce
artists.bio_excerpt: En los últimos 7 años, el galardonado cantante y compositor multi-platino Prince Royce se ha convertido en una auténtica superestrella, con quince #1’s en la radio, 22 Premios Billboard de la Música Latina, 19 Premios lo Nuestro, 19 Premios Juventud, 6 Latin AMAs y 11 nominaciones al Latin GRAMMY®.

artists.name: Rauw Alejandro
artists.bio_excerpt: Latin GRAMMY® award winning and 4x GRAMMY® nominated Puerto Rican singer and songwriter Rauw Alejandro has been leading the new generation of Latin music artists since he appeared on the scene in 2016.

artists.name: Ricky Martin
artists.bio_excerpt: Ricky Martin es la figura líder de la música latina de su generación – amado por los fans de todo el mundo por su comprensión instintiva del ritmo, su pasión por la interpretación y su compasión para dar. artists.name: Romeo Santos
artists.bio_excerpt: Conocido como “El Rey de la Bachata”, Romeo Santos es un ícono mundial que bate récords dentro de la industria de la música latina como cantante, compositor, intérprete, magnate, actor y productor. artists.name: Thalía
artists.bio_excerpt: Ella es “la reina del pop latino” , una de las artistas latinas más populares de las últimas dos décadas.
